name: I have a pre-existing neck problem, can work injury still be covered in Boise?
description: Yes, if work aggravated it; prove with medical opinion.[1]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing neck problem, can work injury still be covered in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work aggravated it; prove with medical opinion.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if work aggravated it substantially; medical evidence shows worsening.[1] Key factors: (1) Doctor opines work caused flare-up; (2) Not just symptoms, but acceleration; (3) Portion compensable. Get specialist eval. Aggravation claims succeed often.
